ABOUT BEFE

Everyone keeps passing around endless derivative coins with names like PEPE,DOggy,ShibFloki,DOge Inu, but BEFE is over it. The Inu & Frog coins have had their moment in the sun. It’s time for the world’s most recognizable meme to take over as the ultimate meme king.

BEFE is here to bring back the glory days of memecoins. It was launched with no presale and has zero taxes. You can earn BEFE by staking BRISE, making it a coin for the people. With its powerful memes, $BEFE will guide you to greatness.

Know more about $BRISE on bitgert.com
